meta.name: SSS-8 Somatic Symptom Scale
meta.description: The SSS-8 is a brief 8-item self-report measure for assessing somatic symptom burden, abbreviated from the PHQ-15 by Gierk et al. It covers gastrointestinal, pain, fatigue, and cardiopulmonary domains.
meta.author: Gierk et al. (2014)
meta.reference: Gierk B, Kohlmann S, Kroenke K, et al. The Somatic Symptom Scale-8 (SSS-8): A brief measure of somatic symptom burden. JAMA Intern Med. 2014;174(3):399-407.
meta.instruction: During the past 7 days, how much have you been bothered by each of the following symptoms?

questions.text: Pain in your arms, legs, or joints (knees, hips, etc.)
Chest pain or shortness of breath
Feeling tired or having low energy
Trouble falling asleep or staying asleep

ranges.label: No/Minimal Somatic Symptoms
ranges.description: Your somatic symptom burden is very low, within the normal range. This indicates that you are currently experiencing minimal physical discomfort, with somatic symptoms within the normal range.
suggestions: Continue maintaining a healthy lifestyle
Occasional discomfort is a normal fluctuation
Continue maintaining healthy lifestyle habits
Get regular check-ups to maintain physical health
Keep up moderate exercise and a balanced diet

ranges.label: Mild Somatic Symptoms
ranges.description: You have some mild somatic symptoms, possibly related to daily stress or lifestyle factors. Mild physical discomfort is common. Rest and healthy lifestyle habits can often help alleviate these symptoms.
suggestions: Monitor symptom changes and maintain healthy routines
Regular exercise and relaxation may help
If symptoms persist beyond two weeks, consider seeing a doctor
Pay attention to your body signals and rest when needed
Maintain regular exercise and healthy eating habits

ranges.label: Moderate Somatic Symptoms
ranges.description: Your somatic symptom burden is moderate and may affect daily functioning. Consider seeking medical attention. At this level, physical symptoms may cause discomfort and affect your daily activities and emotional state.
suggestions: Consider seeing a doctor for a physical examination
Understand the mind-body connection — psychological stress can manifest as physical symptoms
Regular exercise and adequate sleep may help
Consider psychological counseling if needed
Consider consulting a doctor for a physical examination

ranges.label: High Somatic Symptoms
ranges.description: Your somatic symptom burden is high and may significantly affect daily life and work. Your somatic symptom scores are elevated, and these discomforts may be significantly affecting your quality of life. Both medical and psychological evaluation is recommended.
suggestions: Recommend seeing a doctor for a comprehensive examination
Also consider a mental health evaluation
Learn about somatic symptom disorder
Integrated treatment (addressing both body and mind) is most effective
Consult a doctor for a comprehensive physical examination as soon as possible

ranges.label: Very High Somatic Symptoms
ranges.description: You reported a severe somatic symptom burden. A comprehensive psychosomatic evaluation is strongly recommended. Your somatic symptom scores are elevated, and these discomforts may be significantly affecting your quality of life. Both medical and psychological evaluation is recommended.
suggestions: Please see a doctor soon for a thorough physical examination
A psychiatric/psychological consultation is also recommended
Severe somatic symptoms may require a comprehensive treatment plan
Do not overlook the impact of these symptoms on quality of life
Consult a doctor for a comprehensive physical examination as soon as possible

gastrointestinal.label: Low
gastrointestinal.description: Minimal gastrointestinal symptoms. This indicates that you are currently experiencing minimal physical discomfort, with somatic symptoms within the normal range.
suggestions: Continue maintaining healthy lifestyle habits
Get regular check-ups to maintain physical health
Keep up moderate exercise and a balanced diet

gastrointestinal.label: Moderate
gastrointestinal.description: Some gastrointestinal discomfort. Mild physical discomfort is common. Rest and healthy lifestyle habits can often help alleviate these symptoms.
suggestions: Pay attention to your body signals and rest when needed
Maintain regular exercise and healthy eating habits
Learn relaxation techniques to relieve physical tension
Ensure adequate sleep
If symptoms persist, consult a doctor to rule out physical conditions

gastrointestinal.label: High
gastrointestinal.description: Notable gastrointestinal symptoms. At this level, physical symptoms may cause discomfort and affect your daily activities and emotional state.
suggestions: Consider consulting a doctor for a physical examination
Understand the relationship between mind and body
Learn stress management and relaxation techniques
Maintain moderate exercise and social activities
Keep a symptom diary to help track changes

pain.label: Low
pain.description: Minimal pain symptoms. This indicates that you are currently experiencing minimal physical discomfort, with somatic symptoms within the normal range.
suggestions: Continue maintaining healthy lifestyle habits
Get regular check-ups to maintain physical health
Keep up moderate exercise and a balanced diet

pain.label: Moderate
pain.description: Some pain symptoms. Mild physical discomfort is common. Rest and healthy lifestyle habits can often help alleviate these symptoms.
suggestions: Pay attention to your body signals and rest when needed
Maintain regular exercise and healthy eating habits
Learn relaxation techniques to relieve physical tension
Ensure adequate sleep
If symptoms persist, consult a doctor to rule out physical conditions

pain.label: High
pain.description: Notable pain symptoms. Attention recommended. At this level, physical symptoms may cause discomfort and affect your daily activities and emotional state.
suggestions: Consider consulting a doctor for a physical examination
Understand the relationship between mind and body
Learn stress management and relaxation techniques
Maintain moderate exercise and social activities
Keep a symptom diary to help track changes

cardiopulmonary.label: Low
cardiopulmonary.description: Minimal cardiopulmonary symptoms. This indicates that you are currently experiencing minimal physical discomfort, with somatic symptoms within the normal range.
suggestions: Continue maintaining healthy lifestyle habits
Get regular check-ups to maintain physical health
Keep up moderate exercise and a balanced diet

cardiopulmonary.label: Moderate
cardiopulmonary.description: Some cardiopulmonary discomfort. Mild physical discomfort is common. Rest and healthy lifestyle habits can often help alleviate these symptoms.
suggestions: Pay attention to your body signals and rest when needed
Maintain regular exercise and healthy eating habits
Learn relaxation techniques to relieve physical tension
Ensure adequate sleep
If symptoms persist, consult a doctor to rule out physical conditions

cardiopulmonary.label: High
cardiopulmonary.description: Notable cardiopulmonary symptoms. Medical evaluation recommended. At this level, physical symptoms may cause discomfort and affect your daily activities and emotional state.
suggestions: Consider consulting a doctor for a physical examination
Understand the relationship between mind and body
Learn stress management and relaxation techniques
Maintain moderate exercise and social activities
Keep a symptom diary to help track changes

fatigue.label: Low
fatigue.description: Minimal fatigue. This indicates that you are currently experiencing minimal physical discomfort, with somatic symptoms within the normal range.
suggestions: Continue maintaining healthy lifestyle habits
Get regular check-ups to maintain physical health
Keep up moderate exercise and a balanced diet

fatigue.label: Moderate
fatigue.description: Some fatigue present. Mild physical discomfort is common. Rest and healthy lifestyle habits can often help alleviate these symptoms.
suggestions: Pay attention to your body signals and rest when needed
Maintain regular exercise and healthy eating habits
Learn relaxation techniques to relieve physical tension
Ensure adequate sleep
If symptoms persist, consult a doctor to rule out physical conditions

fatigue.label: High
fatigue.description: Notable fatigue. Attention to sleep and rest recommended. At this level, physical symptoms may cause discomfort and affect your daily activities and emotional state.
suggestions: Consider consulting a doctor for a physical examination
Understand the relationship between mind and body
Learn stress management and relaxation techniques
Maintain moderate exercise and social activities
Keep a symptom diary to help track changes
